span.p: NO - raw text is the only export

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: New data source to add to CS mart

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does the export contain free-text fields - verbatims - message bodies - email bodies?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Can the source system export a pre-derived form - sentiment score - keyword flag - volume only?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: LAND DERIVED FORM ONLY - route to data-platform with derived-only spec - no raw text in mart

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: MANDATORY SECURITY-REVIEWER REVIEW - raw PII text requires explicit approval - default answer is do not land

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does the export contain direct identifiers - email address - phone number - personal name?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Are identifiers needed for identity resolution or CS-motion attribution?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ROUTE TO DATA-PLATFORM IDENTITY RESOLUTION ONLY - identifiers go into bridge table - not into mart metrics

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: STRIP IDENTIFIERS BEFORE LANDING - instruct data-platform to drop identifier fields from mart payload

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: LAND AS-IS - standard mart spec - document source and grain
